advancements.skystone.creators_gratitude: o pini e pali ale pi ilo SkyStone!
book.skystone.creators_gratitude.title: SkyStone: lipu pi jan pali
book.skystone.creators_gratitude.page1:
a! sina pali e ni ale? sina pini e pali musi ale?!

mi sitelen e nasin ilo tawa musi ni. ni li pali meso. taso mi lukin e ni: sina kama jo e len utala pi kiwen sewi ale, sina anpa tan leko nanpa 100 li moli ala, sina kama e jan kiwen mute tawa pakala pi monsuta moli...
book.skystone.creators_gratitude.page2:
ni li nasa li suli a!

sina pana e tenpo sina tawa musi SkyStone li pini e ona. tan ni la mi pana e pona suli tawa sina. tawa jan pali la ni li pona suli a. ma sin sina o pona!

— AmedoNai.
book.skystone.creators_gratitude.page3:
sina wile pana e pilin sina anu ijo sin la, o sitelen tawa mi lon lipu toki ni. mi kama toki sin a!
